# rawValue

**Instance Property**

The raw value that represents the typed array’s type.

## Declaration

```swift
var rawValue: UInt32
```

## Initializers

- **init(_:)**: Creates a typed array.
- **init(rawValue:)**: Creates a typed array with the specified raw value.

items.description: Creates a typed array with the specified raw value.
items.name: init(rawValue:)
